# oidc-provider.dev
> Community documentation for panva/node-oidc-provider

This site documents oidc-provider, an OpenID Certified™ OAuth 2.0
Authorization Server implementation for Node.js.

## Sections
- Getting Started: installation, quick start, framework mounting
- Configuration: adapter, claims, clients, features, interactions, JWKS, tokens, cookies
- Guides: user flows, custom grants, middleware, proxy setup
- Events: complete event reference
- FAQ

## Source
Content is derived from https://github.com/panva/node-oidc-provider
